caption: A man with glasses and hair pulled back stands before a microphone, singing or speaking. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest featuring ornate blue and red embroidery on the chest. He holds an acoustic guitar, though only the top portion is visible. The setting is indoors, with a backdrop of vertical wooden panels and horizontal slats. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including a woman with blonde hair and another with white hair. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in place, slightly shifting his posture and moving his mouth as he performs, while the audience in the foreground remains still.
